news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, on May 14, 2025, Zefiro Methane Corp. unveiled their financial performance for the fiscal quarter ending on March 31, 2025. Operating under tickers Cboe Canada: ZEFI, Frankfurt: Y6B, and OTCQB US: ZEFIF, the Company reported its consolidated financial results. The numbers disclosed include revenue, expenses, profits, and other relevant financial metrics for the specified period.
news.headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. reports Q3 earnings with revenue totaling USD $6.9 million.

news.summary: Metronet, recently recognized as the fastest major ISP by PCMag, revealed its intention to allocate tens of millions of dollars towards introducing 100% fiber-optic internet in Bartlett, Ill. This privately financed venture will provide symmetrical, multigigabit fiber-optic connectivity to households and commercial establishments. Residents can enjoy speeds of up to five gigabits per second, while businesses will have access to speeds of up to ten gigabits per second. Construction is slated to commence within the next few weeks.
news.headline: Metronet to invest millions to bring 100% fiber-optic internet to Bartlett, Ill, offering up to 5 gigabits/sec to residents and 10 gigabits/sec to businesses.

news.summary: The news carries a warning that it should not be distributed in the United States to avoid violating securities law. Failure to comply with this restriction may result in legal consequences.
news.headline: Alaris Equity Partners increases size of Convertible Unsecured Senior Debentures. US distribution restricted. Potential violation of US law.
US House Speaker Johnson on SALT: I'm confident we'll be able to work out a compromise.

news.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has experienced a massive 416% surge in the past year, indicating strong accumulation trends despite increased speculation. The market data suggests that selling pressure is being absorbed, paving the way for a potential bullish breakout. Currently, XRP is priced at $2.58, showing a 2% increase in the last 24 hours and a significant 21.6% uptrend over the past 7 days. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is valued at $104,021.57, with a 0.5% increase in the last 24 hours and a 7.4% increase over the past week. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) stands at $2,614.78, recording a 3.6% uptrend in the last 24 hours and an impressive 43.2% increase over the previous 7 days. Analyst BorisVest from CryptoQuant suggests that XRP is gearing up for a bullish move following a recent drop in open interest from a record high of $1.5 billion. This optimistic outlook is further supported by the launch of institutional products in the crypto market. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: XRP has surged 416% in the past year, with the price currently at $2.58. Analysts anticipate a bullish breakout.

news.summary: Kinexys, the blockchain division of JPMorgan (NYSE: JPM), recently completed its inaugural public transaction involving tokenized U.S. Treasury bonds on the Ondo Chain (CRYPTO: ONDO). This significant milestone in blockchain-based financial settlement utilized Ondo Finance's tokenized U.S. Treasuries Fund (OUSG) and was facilitated through Chainlink's (CRYPTO: LINK) cross-chain infrastructure. Notably, this event marked the premier public utilization of JPMorgan's Kinexys Digital Payments platform for trading a tokenized asset on a public ledger. The transaction operation followed a Delivery versus Payment (DvP) model, exchanging the tokenized asset on the Ondo Chain. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: JPMorgan's Kinexys completes first public trade of tokenized U.S. Treasury bonds on Ondo Chain using Chainlink infrastructure.

news.summary: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is experiencing a surge in bullish momentum due to ongoing token burns and increased adoption of the Shibarium Layer 2 network, leading to speculation of a significant upward movement. The current price of SHIB is $0.00001589 with a market cap of $9.4 billion, showing a 2% increase in the last 24 hours and a 23.6% increase over the past week. In comparison, Dogecoin (DOGE) is priced at $0.2344 with a market cap of $34.9 billion, showing a 2.8% increase in the last 24 hours and a 35.5% increase over the past week. Pepe (PEPE) is priced at $0.00001381 with a market cap of $5.8 billion, showing a 1% decrease in the last 24 hours but a significant 68.7% increase over the past week. Crypto educator Henry, also known as LordOfAlts, predicts that the current rally is just the beginning, especially with the rising popularity of Shibarium. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu burns 46 million SHIB in single day, fueling bullish momentum. SHIB: $0.00001589, $9.4B market cap, 7-day trend +23.6%. DOGE: $0.2344, $34.9B market cap, 7-day trend +35.5%. PEPE: $0.00001381, $5.8B market cap, 7-day trend +68.7%. LordOfAlts sees potential for explosive rally with Shibarium.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on May 14, 2025, North Castle Partners, a prominent private equity firm and investment partner of CR Fitness Holdings LLC, the primary franchisee for Crunch Fitness, has honored CEO Tony Scrimale with the prestigious "CEO of the Year" award for 2025. This recognition is part of an ongoing tradition within the company.
news.headline: Tony Scrimale, top Crunch Fitness franchisee, wins North Castle Partners' "CEO of the Year" award for 2025.

news.summary: In San Diego on May 14, 2025, an announcement was made by SOLV Energy regarding the appointment of Ron Stark to the position of Senior Vice President, Controller, and Principal Accounting Officer. With a wealth of experience, Ron has successfully guided teams through major changes in his previous role as Chief Executive. The news does not provide details but highlights Ron's expertise in managing financial matters within the company.
news.headline: SOLV Energy names Ron Stark as Senior VP, Controller, and Principal Accounting Officer. Experienced executive for leading transformations.

news.summary: In Mexico City on May 14, 2025, Vento Motorcycles U.S.A., a well-known manufacturer in the U.S. of motorcycles, scooters, ATVs, and off-road vehicles, made a notable advancement in its expansion and modernization plan. The company has chosen Teamwork Commerce as its new Point of Sale system, marking a pivotal move for Vento Motorcycles U.S.A. in enhancing their operations.
news.headline: Vento Motorcycles U.S.A. partners with Teamwork Commerce for expansion in Mexico. Renowned U.S. manufacturer upgrades retail tech.

news.summary: Great Quest Gold Ltd., based in Vancouver, has signed a letter agreement on May 7, 2025, with Lotus Gold Corporation. Under the agreement, Great Quest plans to acquire all of Lotus's outstanding securities by issuing new common shares. The deal will be based on the Exchange Ratio. Great Quest is listed on the TSX-V under the symbol GQ.
news.headline: Great Quest Gold in Vancouver plans a reverse takeover with Lotus Gold, exchanging securities for GQ shares. $GQ.V #Namibia

news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of May 14, 2025, the Hydrothermal Carbonization (HTC) Market is categorized into different types including sewage sludge, food waste, animal manure, and macroalgae. These segments cater to various applications such as fuel, water treatment, soil amendment, supercapacitor, and energy storage. This market shows promising growth potential with a significant number of participants involved in the production and utilization of HTC for various purposes.
news.headline: Hydrothermal Carbonization market to hit USD 2019 million by 2031, key trends & opportunities.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, in Seattle, Edge Delta, a leading provider of intelligent telemetry pipelines for security and observability data, appointed Jabari Norton as the Head of Channel, Partnerships & Alliances. Mr. Norton, with significant experience, will be responsible for developing strategic partnerships.
news.headline: Edge Delta names Jabari Norton as Head of Channel, Partnerships & Alliances in Seattle on May 14, 2025.

news.summary: InSync Training has once again been acknowledged as one of the top 20 training companies for staffing and temporary resources in 2025. The announcement was made on May 14, 2025, in Portsmouth, N.H. InSync Training has been recognized for its excellence in training services, making it a prestigious addition to the Training Industry Top 20 list for this year. This recognition underscores their commitment to providing exceptional training solutions.
news.headline: InSync Training named a top 20 staffing training company for 2025 by Training Industry. Proud of recognition.

news.summary: Santa Monica, California, May 14, 2025 - Super League Enterprise, Inc. (NASDAQ: SLE), a leading company in reshaping brand-consumer interactions through playable media, declared that the underwriter for its recent public common stock offering has chosen to purchase an additional 617,647 shares at $0.17 per share. This results in added gross earnings of about $105,000. With this, the total shares sold in the public offering by the Company now stands at 5,735,294, bringing the overall gross earnings to nearly $974,999, before deduction of underwriting fees and other anticipated offering costs. The closing of the over-allotment option is anticipated on May 14, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.
news.headline: Super League Enterprise, Inc. has announced 617,647 additional shares sold at $0.17/share, increasing gross proceeds to $105,000.

news.summary: In Danbury, Connecticut on May 14, 2025, Danbury Mission Technologies, a subsidiary of ARKA Group, L.P., revealed the reception of their second delivery order under a $136 million, 5-year indefinite-delivery, indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract from the U.S. Army Contracting Command in Detroit.
news.headline: Danbury Mission Technologies receives 2nd delivery order on $136M U.S. Army contract for laser detecting sets.

news.headline: Global AI in diagnostics market to reach $5.44B by 2030, with a CAGR of 22.46% - Grand View Research, Inc.

news.headline: Perfios unveils 'Switch' at Dubai FinTech Summit 2025, an AI solution for mortgage operations.

news.summary: In MISSISSAUGA, Ontario, Ryan, a top global provider of tax services and software, has been included in the 2025 Best Workplaces™ for Mental Wellness in Canada list. This is the fifth occasion that the firm has been recognized for this achievement. Garry Round, President of Canadian Operations, expressed gratitude for the award, highlighting Ryan's dedication to prioritizing mental wellness in the workplace. The company is committed to continuing initiatives that support employee well-being.
news.headline: Ryan, based in Mississauga, Ontario, recognized as one of the Best Workplaces™ for Mental Wellness in Canada for the fifth time.

news.summary: In an exciting development, Keller Logistics Group has introduced Solar Logistics Solutions on May 14, 2025. This new venture is a dedicated logistics division that aims to offer tailored transportation, warehousing, and supply chain services. Solar Logistics Solutions is committed to catering to the expanding solar energy sector and is set to play a pivotal role in this industry.
news.headline: Keller Logistics Group starts Solar Logistics Solutions division in Ohio, targeting solar energy industry growth.

news.summary: In Tampa Bay, Florida and Cincinnati, a recent announcement was made on May 14, 2025, regarding the Tampa Bay Lightning's new multi-year media rights deal with Scripps Sports. This agreement will allow fans in the Tampa Bay area to watch Lightning hockey games for free. The agreement is set to provide broader accessibility to the team's games and is anticipated to enhance the viewing experience for fans. This partnership is expected to significantly impact the hockey-watching experience in the region, with numerous fans and enthusiasts looking forward to enjoying the games without any additional costs. The move is a strategic step by the Tampa Bay Lightning to increase their viewership, engage with fans more effectively, and strengthen their presence in the local community.
news.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning partners with Scripps Sports for multi-year deal to air NHL games; fans can watch for free.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of May 14, 2025, the worldwide Radiation, Detection, Monitoring & Safety Market, which was worth US$3,132.2 million in 2023, is projected to experience significant growth with a strong compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.3%. This market is estimated to reach US$3,381.2 million by the end of 2024 and is expected to soar to an impressive US$5,452.4 million by 2030.
news.headline: Global Radiation, Detection, Monitoring & Safety Market to reach US$5,452.4 million by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 8.3%.

news.summary: The French interior minister, Bruno Retailleau, is planning to meet cryptocurrency professionals following a violent kidnapping attempt on the family of a crypto exchange executive in Paris. Three masked men attacked Pierre Noizat's daughter and grandson in Paris, with passersby intervening to thwart the abduction. Retailleau aims to discuss security measures with crypto professionals in response to the incident. Jameson Lopp's list on GitHub shows 22 in-person crypto-related thefts so far this year. The University of Cambridge highlighted underreporting of such attacks in 2024. Paris has seen similar incidents before, including a recent 7 million euro kidnapping plot involving a crypto entrepreneur's father. David Balland, co-founder of Ledger, was also abducted earlier this year. Retailleau's meeting with crypto professionals comes in the wake of increased risks for cryptoholders and calls for better protection strategies.
news.headline: French minister to discuss crypto security with industry professionals after violent kidnapping attempt in Paris involving a crypto executive's family. Official invites sent out after incident. Ongoing investigation on the incident. growing threats to crypto holders with 22 in-person theft incidents recorded so far. Paris facing multiple crypto-related crimes including kidnapping cases. Anonymity crucial for protection against attacks.

news.summary: A recent research report indicates that the Extended Detection and Response Market is estimated to expand significantly, from USD 1.7 billion in 2023 to USD 8.8 billion by 2028. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 38.4% during the forecast period. The surge in cyberattacks has elevated the demand for XDR solutions, prompting organizations to shift from point solutions to XDR solutions. XDR offers comprehensive visibility across crucial data sources such as endpoint, network, cloud, email, identity, IoT/OT, and others, enabling the detection and response to threats that are often overlooked by standalone solutions.
news.headline: Extended Detection and Response market is set to reach $8.8 billion by 2028, growing at a CAGR of 38.4% due to rising cyberattacks. Led by Trend Micro, Microsoft, and Bitdefender.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, The Gabelli Equity Trust Inc. (NYSE:GAB) announced that its Board of Directors has confirmed its commitment to the 10% distribution policy. They declared a cash distribution of $0.15 per share, scheduled to be paid on June 23, 2025. This distribution will go to common stock shareholders who are officially recorded as of June 13, 2025.
news.headline: Gabelli Equity Trust reaffirms 10% distribution policy with $0.15 per share Q2 distribution to shareholders.

news.summary: On May 14, 2025, Armada, Second Front, and Microsoft revealed the implementation of Second Front's Frontier platform on Microsoft Azure Local, situated in an Armada Galleon modular data center in San Francisco. This joint effort marks a notable milestone in the technological advancement of the companies involved.
news.headline: Armada, Second Front, and Microsoft collaborate for Edge applications with Second Front's Frontier on Microsoft Azure Local in Armada data center.

news.summary: Executives at Warner Bros. Discovery have decided to revert back to the name HBO Max for their sought-after streaming service. This marks the fourth name alteration for the platform over the past ten years.
